CustomField.description: Heap Size usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c) || ISBLANK(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c) || AuditTransaction__r.LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c = 0, "N/A", IF(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.HeapSize.WorkItemRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.HeapSize.WorkItemAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c * 100, 1)) & "% of txn (" & TEXT(LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsHeapSizeConsumed__c) & " bytes)" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Heap Size usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.label: Heap Size
